name: Central Kitchen Chilled Warehouse
address: PT. Maju Mapan Central Kitchen - Chilled Prep Room
detail: Primary chilled storage for broth, sauces, fresh toppings, and outlet-ready ramen kits. Operates under FIFO with daily dispatch waves.

name: Central Kitchen Frozen Warehouse
address: PT. Maju Mapan Central Kitchen - Freezer Room
detail: Frozen storage for gyoza, ebi tempura, and seafood toppings with temperature-controlled picking for outlet replenishment.

name: Central Kitchen Dry Warehouse
address: PT. Maju Mapan Central Kitchen - Dry Goods Store
detail: Ambient warehouse for packaging, dry garnishes, labels, and long shelf-life consumables used by the central kitchen.

name: Emporium Pluit Outlet Store
address: RamenYA! Mall Emporium Pluit - Back of House
detail: Outlet back-of-house store for chilled ramen kits and frozen sides supporting lunch and dinner service replenishment.

name: Senayan City Outlet Store
address: RamenYA! Senayan City - Back of House
detail: High-volume outlet storage focused on Chicken Legendary Ramen kits, chiller rotation, and lunch peak readiness.

name: Kuningan City Outlet Store
address: RamenYA! Kuningan City - Back of House
detail: Outlet storage for chilled ramen base kits and frozen seafood toppings, with dinner-service replenishment checks.

name: Senayan Park Outlet Store
address: RamenYA! Senayan Park - Back of House
detail: Outlet store for weekend promo volume, packaging stock, and chilled kit staging before service rush.
